title: epipactis × barreana
intro: Epipactis × barreana, also known as Barre's Helleborine, is a hybrid orchid plant species resulting from the cross between Epipactis helleborine and Epipactis microphylla. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds that have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Barre's Helleborine include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizomes are typically used to create teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use and efficacy are not extensively documented in modern medicine.
